title: Social Media Consultation… - Chris Elmore MP
text_excerpt: Social Media Consultation… - Chris Elmore MP Skip to main content Chris Elmore MP MP for Bridgend & Porthcawl About Chris Social Media Survey Funding Advice Day Info Pack Contact Latest news... Monthly Report Am I your MP? Upcoming Advice Surgeries Annual Report 2024/2025 Business of the Week! Privacy Policy More Menu 6th March, 2026 Social Media Consultation… The UK Government is currently considering new steps to help protect children and young people from harm online. As part of this work, a national consultation is exploring a range of options — including the possibility of introducing restrictions on social media use for those under the age of 16. As these discussions move forward, it is important that the views of local communities are heard. I am particularly keen to hear from parents, carers and young people across Bridgend & Porthcawl about what these potential changes might mean in practice and whether you believe they would make a difference. Your feedback will help ensure that local perspectives are included in the national conversation about how best to keep children safe online while supporting young people to use digital spaces responsibly. If you have a few moments to spare, please consider sharing your views by completing my short survey by clicking the link below. 👉 Click here to take part in the survey 👈 Social Media Consultation Chris Elmore MP Contact details 33 Caroline Street, Bridgend CF31 1DW, UK View on Google Maps Email: [email protected] Further details Promoted by Carys Price on behalf of Chris Elmore both at 33 Caroline Street, Bridgend, CF31 1DW. ©2026 Copyright Chris Elmore MP/Labour All rights reserved.
